reasoning: The control CA-7(4) focuses on continuous monitoring and risk monitoring, which can be mapped to Kubernetes through audit logging and network policy monitoring. Kubernetes audit logs can track changes and activities within the cluster, similar to cloud monitoring services. NetworkPolicies can be monitored for changes to ensure security configurations remain intact. Admission controllers can log policy changes, ensuring that any modifications to security policies are tracked.
